source: npm run test:ci with expanded critical-domain coverage include set

requirements.description: Auth stub session loader must retain ≥93% line coverage to guard Cypress login flows.
Route guard matrix enforcement requires ≥95% coverage across guard variants.
Preview configuration sanitizer needs ≥95% coverage for CI environment safety.
Runtime bootstrap must stay highly covered because it gates app startup.
Supabase client bootstrap/proxy behavior must remain stable.
Booking API route handler is business critical for scheduling.
Dashboard proxy authorization and routing logic should remain covered.
